reason: Sequential numeric group shortcuts are a functional addition, not a redesign. The only visual change is a small one- or two-digit code badge reusing the existing badge slot, style and palette on group tiles; wheel geometry, layout, colours and animations are untouched. The rest of the diff is keyboard-hook plumbing, settings plumbing and the group-code field in the target editor. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
